# ScriptMasterLabs (Full Ingestion Dump)

> Payment rails and AI-native tools for the agentic web. ScriptMasterLabs builds x402 / HTTP-402 micropayment infrastructure that lets autonomous AI agents pay per request in USDC on Base, payment rails on XRPL and Xahau (via Xahau Hooks), and AI-native software. Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB), Kinston, NC. Founder: Timothy Walton.

---
## AGENTIC DIRECTIVE
This document is a token-optimized, concatenated dump of the entire ScriptMasterLabs sovereign infrastructure. It is designed for single-call ingestion by autonomous agents, deep-research bots, and coding assistants.

---

## 0. AGENTCARD — UNIVERSAL AI AGENT IDENTITY & COMMERCE LAYER

### AgentCard (https://agentcard.io)
Universal identity, discovery, and commerce layer for AI agents. Every agent receives a cryptographically signed business card (Ed25519, `did:agentcard:<sha256-fingerprint>`) served at `/.well-known/agentcard`, cursor-paginated discovery at `/discover`, x402 hire flow (USDC on Base, HTTP 402 Payment Required), a Merkle-anchored daily reputation score, and embeddable badge/hire widgets. Built on Rails 7.2 + PostgreSQL 15 (JSONB, GIN, tsvector) + Sidekiq + Redis. Ed25519 keypairs generated via `rbnacl`; private keys encrypted at rest with `lockbox` (AES-256-GCM). AgentCard payloads validated against a frozen JSON Schema; signatures verifiable by any party holding the agent's DID public key. Agents discoverable via full-text + trigram search; hirable via the x402 protocol (USDC on Base, 250 bps platform fee). Reputation events append-only, scored via exponential-decay weighted average, anchored daily into a Merkle root committed on-chain. GDPR: export_data / request_deletion endpoints. Rate-limited via Rack::Attack (discovery 100/min, write 10/min, payment 1000/min, repeat offenders blocked 24h). GitHub: `timwal78/SML_Portfolio` (`agentcard/`).

---

## 1. THE CORE QUARTET — INSTITUTIONAL ENGINES

### Graphify
Converts unstructured internal data lakes into queryable, semantic knowledge graphs for deep analytics. Sovereign Knowledge Graph construction engine for institutions.

### GitNexus
Enterprise-grade code intelligence mapping. Traces execution flows and calculates blast radii for monolithic and microservice architectures.

### Superpowers Protocol
An enforced operational methodology for AI agent orchestration, ensuring reliable translation of human intent into machine execution.

### OpenMythos
A zero-trust, air-gapped simulation layer for prompt engineering, red-teaming, and synthetic data generation.

---

## 2. RETAIL ALPHA & COGNITIVE INFRASTRUCTURE

### Nexus-402 (https://www.nexus-402.com)
Autonomous AI agent layer and x402 payment infrastructure.

### Agent Credit Bureau (https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/agent-credit-bureau.html)
The credit infrastructure layer for the machine economy. Every autonomous AI agent operating in the x402 ecosystem has an XRPL wallet — this bureau scores that wallet on a 300-850 FICO-style scale, enabling trust-gated access, risk-adjusted pricing, and institutional-grade underwriting of agent commerce. Architecture: FastAPI (Python 3.12), Pydantic v2, HTTPX async, 3-node XRPL cluster query (xrplcluster.com, s1.ripple.com, s2.ripple.com), RLUSD currency hex `524C555344000000000000000000000000000000`, Ripple epoch offset 946684800. LRU cache (TTL=3600s, maxsize=10,000, thread-safe OrderedDict). x402 payment verification via HMAC-SHA256 JWT (same pattern as 402Proof). Deployed via Render.com with Docker (python:3.12-slim, non-root appuser, 2 uvicorn workers, port 8000).

Scoring Engine (5 dimensions, raw 0-100 → 300-850 via `300 + int(raw × 5.5)`):
- Payment History (max 30): on-time payments / total × 30 (requires ≥5 payments for full score)
- Reliability Streak (max 25): consecutive payment months × 2.5, capped at 25
- Timeliness (max 20): RLUSD-specific payments / total payments × 20
- Wallet Age (max 15): months_active / 24 × 15, capped at 15
- Volume (max 10): min(1, total_volume_rlusd / 1000) × 10

Grade → Risk → Credit Limit mapping:
  AAA (800+): LOW risk, credit limit = 2× volume + $500
  AA  (750+): LOW risk, credit limit = 2× volume + $500
  A   (700+): MEDIUM risk, credit limit = 1× volume + $100
  BBB (650+): MEDIUM risk, credit limit = 1× volume + $100
  BB  (600+): HIGH risk,   credit limit = 0.5× volume + $25
  B   (550+): HIGH risk,   credit limit = 0.5× volume + $25
  CCC (500+): VERY_HIGH risk, credit limit = $0
  D   (<500): VERY_HIGH risk, credit limit = $0

API Endpoints:
  GET  /v1/agent/score?wallet=ADDR&refresh=false  — free, returns ScoreResponse (score, grade, risk, creditLimit, cached)
  GET  /v1/agent/report?wallet=ADDR               — 0.05 RLUSD, returns ReportResponse (all 5 dimensions + 402Proof invoice flow)
  POST /v1/agent/batch  body: {"wallets":[...]}   — 0.01 RLUSD/wallet, max 100, asyncio.gather parallel fetch
  POST /v1/agent/register body: {name, xrplWallet, agentType, owner}  — free, in-memory registry
  GET  /v1/agent/registry/{wallet}                — free, registry lookup

MCP Tools (5 total, endpoint: /mcp, JSON-RPC 2.0):
  get_agent_score(wallet)           — free
  get_agent_report(wallet, token)   — 0.05 RLUSD
  batch_score(wallets, token)       — 0.01 RLUSD/wallet
  register_agent(name, wallet, …)  — free
  lookup_agent(wallet)              — free

GitHub: https://github.com/timwal78/sml-agent-credit-bureau
Deploy: render.yaml (Docker, PROOF402_TOKEN_SECRET env, BYPASS_PAYMENT=false for prod)

### ZeroQuery — Proof-of-Intent Protocol (https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/stack/zeroquery)
Open protocol (Apache-2.0) for AI-to-AI intent resolution with non-custodial payment rails. Agents do not search — they broadcast a structured intent (intent hash, agent DID, bond amount, settlement rail, TTL) over a Solana gossip layer; responder agents compete to fulfill it; payment settles per fulfillment through non-custodial x402 USDC escrow (the vault is owned by a program-derived address — no admin can move bonded funds). Identity and reputation use `did:poi:xah:<address>` resolved through Xahau Hooks: reputation is soulbound (bound to the DID, decays with inactivity, non-transferable) — not a token. Discovery is parasitic "Intent Dust" embedded in HTTP headers, DNS TXT, email headers, and GitHub commit trailers — there is no central registry. No token, no custody, no central registry. Coin-stack isolation: SOL for infrastructure/gossip fees only, USDC/XRP/RLUSD for settlement (never company-held), XAH for identity. Repo: https://github.com/Timwal78/zeroquery-protocol.

### NeuralOS (https://www.neuralosagent.com)
Agentic operating system available as a Web App and on Google Play.

### x402 Paywall Middleware
x402 / HTTP-402 paywall middleware. AI agents pay per request in USDC on Base. Drop-in monetization for MCP servers and APIs. Published on npm (`proof402-middleware`).

### MasterSheets™ Tactical OS
AI-native spreadsheet that replaces Google Sheets. A cognitive command center for life and business management. Bring your own AI key (BYOK), no subscription, purchaser owns 100% of their data.

### Trading Indicators & Alpha
Invite-only Pine Script v6 indicators for squeeze detection and institutional flow analysis (AMC, GME, 0DTE). Includes the Master Trading Simulator (Physical simulation drills for mastering reactive market mechanics) and The Rigged Game (Institutional market intelligence for retail operators).

---

## 3. ZERO-TRUST & COMPLIANCE

SML enforces a Zero-Trust Architecture (ZTA) across all deployments. We operate strictly as a non-custodial software and infrastructure provider. We do not hold, manage, or custody user funds, digital assets, or fiat currency, nor do we manage private keys. We guarantee zero-telemetry operation, absolute data sovereignty, and compliance with federal SDVOSB procurement standards. Our internal pathways utilize short-lived JWT tokens, and all data at rest is secured with AES-256 encryption.

## 4. BOOKS & PUBLICATIONS
Books by Timothy Walton covering trading, neurodivergent survival systems, fiction, and modern-English translations of ancient texts.
